inventory.note: Target values are source categories, not parser confidence classes.
Human/editor-facing section code; `section_code` is the Works sheet lookup helper.
Parent relation ID for hierarchical records.
Google Sheets display helper for parent section code.
Language code; `language_code` is the Works sheet lookup helper.
Google Sheets helper for linking a work row to an issue/container row.
Google Sheets display helper; canonical relation rows live in `WorkAuthors`/`source_authors`.
Raw author string before normalized author links.
Legacy editor/Sheets helper; target uses structured physical fields and `extent`.
Legacy Work sheet helper; target article pages live in `ArticlePlacements.pages_raw`, `page_start`, `page_end`.
Canonical raw bibliographic/publication detail field. Legacy Google Sheets alias `publication_details_raw` is import-only.
Raw host/container title before normalized placement.
Annotation/public review text, including trailing parser `{...}` annotation.
Free-text provenance for the source record, for example `Баранов 2021`, `ручное добавление`, `Google Sheets`, `сообщение пользователя`, `проверено по РГБ`.
Timestamp when the entity first appeared in the editor database.
Timestamp when the record/relation was last changed.
Timestamp when the relation first appeared in the editor database. Relation-level provenance uses timestamps only unless a future workflow needs relation-specific `data_source`.
Google Sheets display helper for relation tabs.
Google Sheets display helper for relation tabs.
Author name as printed in source.
Google Sheets display helper for issue rows.
Periodical place; source publication place remains `publication_place`.
Issue/container year. Source year is exported as `inferred_year`.
Issue date text in Google Sheets/editor compatibility layer; artifact currently exports `chronology`/`enumeration` plus `publication_date`.
Article placement row ID in artifact.
Google Sheets helper: issue/container target ID before canonical placement export.
Google Sheets helper: issue/container target type.
Google Sheets display helper for container target.
Google Sheets display helper for group item rows.
Google Sheets display helper for tag relation rows.
Google Sheets display helper for parent tag title.
Compatibility references only; not canonical public identifiers.
